title: 7 Herbal Creams For Bunion
description: Hypericum perforatum creams contains hyperforin and emodin, two active constituents that help with bunions. Hyperforin has anti-inflammatory properties, which reduce swelling and pain in the affected area. Emodin, on the other hand, has antiseptic properties that prevent infection and promote healing. The cream also contains flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have antioxidant properties that help protect the skin and joints from further damage. By reducing inflammation, preventing in...
